content.en:
Although Ye Tian had never seen the first god lord of the god clan and the first demon lord of the demon clan.

But when the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord appeared, Ye Tian recognized their identities at a glance.

Because in the universe, only the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord have such a terrifying momentum, completely crushing any other Supreme, even if it is the Kunwu Supreme, it is far from being able to compete with the First God Lord of the God Race and the First Demon Lord of the Demon Race, the gap between them is too big!

The Protoss and the Demon Race are worthy of being super clans, and the gap between the Human Race and the Protoss and the Demon Race is still too big, no wonder the Kunwu Supremes are so jealous of the Protoss.

Rumble!!!

The First God Lord and the First Demon Lord immediately took out a supreme treasure after they appeared, and then joined forces with other supremes to suppress the abyss of destruction.

Ahh!!!hh

Countless screams and terrifying shocks came from the abyss of destruction.

Ye Tian even saw terrifying phantoms from the image of the shattered abyss, it was an extremely powerful destructive creature, far more powerful than the destructive creature that Ye Tian had killed before.

At this time, the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord and other supreme beings were joining forces to drive the destructive creatures of the Shattered Abyss deeper into the depths.

Otherwise, Ye Tian's galaxy-level and galaxy-level cultivators would not be able to step into the abyss of destruction at all, and once they entered, they would be killed by the destructive creatures.

Under the leadership of the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord, many Supremes successfully drove the Creatures of Destruction to the deepest depths of the Abyss of Destruction.

Gradually, Ye Tian could no longer hear the roars and screams of the destructive creatures.

The abyss of destruction has calmed down!

"Hurry up and get in, remember, don't go deep into the abyss of destruction, or we won't be able to save you. "

The first god lord of the god race and the first demon lord of the demon race spoke.

Of course, they mainly say it to their own people.

The Terran Supreme also reminded Ye Tian and the galaxy-level and galaxy-level that the Terran was going to enter.

Kunwu Supreme also reminded Ye Tian that after entering that realm, he must be careful and careful, and at the same time, he must be wary of the powerhouses of the God Clan and the Demon Race.

After all, the Protoss and the Demon Race are relatively familiar with that place, while the Terrans are really blinded and don't understand the situation there at all.

But this time is indeed a big opportunity, the human race naturally doesn't want to miss it, and Ye Tian doesn't want to miss it either.

Whoa!!

The galaxy-level and galaxy-level powerhouses of the various races in the universe flew into the abyss of destruction one by one, and Ye Tian also flew into the abyss of destruction for the first time.

As soon as he stepped into the Abyss of Destruction, Ye Tian felt the suppression of the Abyss of Destruction on him.

In the abyss of destruction, although Ye Tian could feel the laws of heaven and earth, the laws here were too weak, which seriously affected his strength.

However, Ye Tian had already condensed the origin of the sword, and the Chaos Dao was not far away from the Law Realm.

Coupled with Ye Tian's terrifying physical strength and the strength of the immortal soul of the underworld.

Here, his strength is incomparably terrifying.

Even if you can't stand up to an ordinary creature of destruction, it's enough to easily escape from an ordinary creature of destruction.

At this time, one day should be regarded as the most calm one among the many cultivators, on the other hand, although the others did not seem to be flustered at all on the surface, but in the depths of their eyes, they were extremely solemn and worried, for fear that if a destructive creature rushed over, then they would definitely die.

In the Abyss of Destruction, the speed of everyone's flight was not fast, but even so, it didn't take long for them to reach the middle level of the Abyss of Destruction.

At this time, Ye Tian sensed a strange fluctuation.

The source of this strange fluctuation must be very simple, and it is very likely that it is the realm that Ye Tian and the others want to enter.

Swish!

The cultivators of the Protoss and the Demon Race immediately searched for the source and flew over, and Ye Tian and the other Terran cultivators also hurriedly flew over.

Soon, they came to the source, and at this time, Ye Tian saw a strange light source, which was originally in the abyss of destruction, and the light would be devoured, and it could not be presented in the abyss of destruction at all.

It can be said that in the Abyss of Destruction, it is impossible to see the light with both eyes, and if you look at it with both eyes, the Abyss of Destruction is a darkness, and you can only observe the surrounding scene with your divine sense.

But now Ye Tian was very surprised, because he could see the light source in front of him with his eyes, and others would definitely be able to see it too.

"It's not easy. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The cultivators of the Protoss and Demon Clans flew towards the light source, and Ye Tian did not hesitate to fly over.

This light source should be the destination of everyone, that is, to extinguish the realm in the abyss.

In an instant, everyone flew into the light source.

Wow!

Heaven and earth rotated, and Ye Tian found himself entering a strange world.

There are no rules in this world, not even the existence of vitality, and no other energy.

It stands to reason that this world cannot exist at all, and it will collapse in an instant, but this world is very strange and exists here, and it is extremely stable.

"What kind of world is this?"

Ye Tian was extremely curious in his heart.

Everyone entering this world should have been teleported randomly, so Ye Tian didn't see anyone else around him, in this place, he was standing here alone. I really didn't just look around and find nothing.

So Ye Tian flew in a certain direction.

Suddenly, Ye Tian came to a mountain cliff.

Because he saw some strange traces of this cliff.

When he came to this cliff, he found that there was a strange wooden house here, and there were sword marks on the cliff, as if someone was practicing swords here.

These sword marks looked very ordinary, as if they were sword marks made by martial arts masters among mortals.

But Ye Tian sensed it slightly, and his expression suddenly changed greatly.

One of the small sword marks, Ye Tian just sensed it slightly, and there was a terrifying sword intent impact.

A wisp of sword intent seemed to tear his soul apart.

If it weren't for this wisp of sword intent, he wouldn't be aggressive, otherwise, he would probably have been killed.

What kind of sword intent is this?

"Ye Tian was extremely shocked!"

After all, this is just sword intent, the rules are not counted, and it is so terrifying.

For the first time, he also knew that there was such a powerful sword intent in the world, which completely broke his cognition.

"It's definitely a retreat for a self-reliant person.

"Strange! In the abyss of destruction, how could there be a strong person in this world? Even the first god of the god race and the first demon lord of the demon race, these two have almost reached the limit of the supreme, and they dare not step into the abyss of destruction. "

couldn't figure it out, so Ye Tian didn't think about it anymore.

He walked into the wooden house, and found that this wooden house was not simple, it seemed to have gone through infinite years, but it seemed to have eternal power on it, and protected this wooden house, so that this wooden house was immortal.

"It's a pity that I'm not practicing the way of the sword, otherwise just by comprehending these sword intents here, I might have amazing gains. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.
